---
title: "Architecture"
---

# Architecture

This is the authoritative design source for Mayon. It is self-contained — build against this document without needing the refinement conversation history.

## Product summary

A personal, **local-first** learning app built around a **branchable chat graph**:

- Chat with an AI about a topic. When a response is too dense, **highlight a span** and **branch** a new conversation rooted in that excerpt — the child inherits the excerpt plus the full history up to that point.
- Every branch is a node in a **navigable tree** (sidebar tree + breadcrumb path to root) with optional **cross-links** between otherwise separate chats.
- From any chat, generate AI **labs** (hands-on guide + progress checklist) and **quizzes** (mixed MCQ / flashcard / AI-graded short answer). Both are **leaf artifacts** on a chat (they do not branch).
- Personal, single-user. Ships as a browser SPA that connects to a local Mayon server container with Postgres.

## Locked decisions

| Area | Decision |
|---|---|
| Form factor | SvelteKit static SPA + required Docker server |
| Framework | SvelteKit, Svelte 5 (runes), SPA via `adapter-static` |
| UI | Tailwind v4 + shadcn-svelte (bits-ui), lucide icons |
| Database | Postgres via server; drizzle-kit schema; pglite for tests |
| AI | Provider-agnostic adapters (OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini/Ollama), streaming |
| Branch context | Excerpt + full history up to the fork point |
| Branch storage | **Reference-based** — child reads ancestor messages up to a fork-point cutoff (no duplication) |
| Transport | Browser streaming `fetch` (IndexedDB keys); server CORS proxy when available |
| Labs/Quizzes | Leaf artifacts generated from a single chat |
| Toolchain | pnpm 10, Node 22 (no bun, no Rust) |

### Key tradeoffs

- **Reference-based branching:** single source of truth, light storage; the accepted cost is that a pre-branch edit in a parent propagates to descendants. If immutability is ever needed, add a content-hash/version column later (no schema break).
- **Server-required:** the app connects to a local Mayon server container for its primary Postgres store. CORS-blocked providers (e.g. Anthropic) stream through the server's CORS proxy; a clear "run the server" message is shown when the server is unreachable.

## System architecture

One codebase. A SvelteKit SPA connects to a local server container that provides Postgres, MCP tooling, LLM proxying, and backup.

```
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  SvelteKit SPA (adapter-static) — Svelte 5 runes           │
│  routes: /chat · /lab · /quiz · /tree · /settings         │
├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  lib/ai      Provider interface · chat stream              │
│              generateLab · generateQuiz · gradeAnswer      │
│              assembleContext (reference-based walk)        │
│  lib/chat    tree ops · branch-from-highlight · crosslinks │
│  lib/db      schema · migrations · repositories           │
├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Postgres (server, primary store)                          │
│  • RemotePgDriver: browser → POST /api/db/query           │
│  • Sandbox SQLite: MCP tools only, not app data           │
│  • LLM CORS proxy · MCP stdio bridge                       │
│  • key in IndexedDB                                        │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
        StorageDriver interface            ProviderTransport interface
```

One seam makes storage swappable:

- **`StorageDriver`** — same SQL schema and repository code over Postgres via RemotePgDriver (browser → server), pglite (tests), or the server sandbox SQLite (MCP tools).

## UI stack

- **SvelteKit** in SPA/static mode (no SSR) — instant loads.
- **Svelte 5 runes** (`$state` / `$derived`) — minimal re-renders, ideal for streaming.
- **Tailwind v4** + **shadcn-svelte** (on **bits-ui**) — accessible, modern components.
- **lucide-svelte** icons; **marked** + **DOMPurify** for markdown; **KaTeX** (math) and **shiki** (code) optional.
- **Highlighter component:** Selection/Range API captures `startChar`/`endChar` on a message and surfaces a "Branch from here" action.
- **Streaming render** of assistant tokens; optimistic UI for branching, checklist ticks, and quiz answers.

## Database

Postgres is the primary store. Schema + migrations via **drizzle-kit**; queries through a typed **repository layer** over the `StorageDriver`. IDs are text UUIDs; timestamps are epoch-ms integers.

### Tables

#### chats

A node in the conversation tree.

| Column | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | TEXT PK | |
| parent_id | TEXT → chats.id | nullable; null = root |
| root_id | TEXT → chats.id | self for root; fast subtree queries |
| branch_point_message_id | TEXT → messages.id | message in parent that this child forked from; null for root |
| title | TEXT | |
| depth | INTEGER | tree depth (display) |
| provider | TEXT | |
| model | TEXT | |
| brief | TEXT | Learning Brief on root chats; nullable |
| created_at / updated_at | INTEGER | |

#### messages

Content of a single chat.

| Column | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | TEXT PK | |
| chat_id | TEXT → chats.id | |
| role | TEXT | system, user, assistant, or tool |
| content | TEXT | markdown |
| ord | INTEGER | ordering within the chat |
| model | TEXT | nullable |
| tokens | INTEGER | nullable |
| tool_call_id | TEXT | nullable |
| tool_name | TEXT | nullable |
| metadata | TEXT | nullable |
| created_at | INTEGER | |

#### branch_sources

Records the exact span a branch came from (traceability).

| Column | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | TEXT PK | |
| source_message_id | TEXT → messages.id | |
| start_char / end_char | INTEGER | span within the message |
| excerpt | TEXT | snapshot of the highlighted text |
| branch_chat_id | TEXT → chats.id | the child created from this highlight |
| custom_instructions | TEXT | nullable |
| add_formats | TEXT | nullable |
| created_at | INTEGER | |

#### cross_links

References between otherwise separate chats.

| Column | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | TEXT PK | |
| from_chat_id / to_chat_id | TEXT → chats.id | |
| note | TEXT | |
| created_at | INTEGER | |

#### labs

Leaf artifact on a chat.

| Column | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | TEXT PK | |
| chat_id | TEXT → chats.id | |
| title | TEXT | |
| content | TEXT | markdown body (intro + steps) |
| checklist | TEXT | JSON `[{id, text, done}]` |
| model | TEXT | |
| created_at / updated_at | INTEGER | |

#### quizzes

| Column | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | TEXT PK | |
| chat_id | TEXT → chats.id | |
| model | TEXT | |
| created_at | INTEGER | |

#### quiz_questions

| Column | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | TEXT PK | |
| quiz_id | TEXT → quizzes.id | |
| ord | INTEGER | |
| type | TEXT | mcq, flashcard, or short |
| prompt | TEXT | |
| payload | TEXT | JSON, type-specific |

`payload` by type:

- `mcq`: `{ options: [...], answerIndex }`
- `flashcard`: `{ front, back }`
- `short`: `{ rubric }`

#### quiz_attempts

| Column | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | TEXT PK | |
| quiz_id | TEXT → quizzes.id | |
| score | INTEGER | nullable until graded |
| started_at | INTEGER | |
| finished_at | INTEGER | |

#### quiz_answers

| Column | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | TEXT PK | |
| attempt_id | TEXT → quiz_attempts.id | |
| question_id | TEXT → quiz_questions.id | |
| answer | TEXT | |
| is_correct | INTEGER | nullable |
| ai_feedback | TEXT | nullable; for short-answer AI grading |
| graded_at | INTEGER | nullable |

#### settings

Key/value store (JSON values).

| Column | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| key | TEXT PK | |
| value | TEXT | JSON |

Provider configs live here. API keys are **not** stored in `settings` — they live in IndexedDB (the browser `KeyStore`); `settings` holds only non-secret handle fields.

### Reference-based context assembly

A child inherits "excerpt + full history up to the fork point" by **reading** ancestor messages — never copying. `branch_point_message_id` on a node points to a message in its **parent** and defines how many of the parent's own messages the child sees.

```
assembleContext(target):
  parts = []
  # 1) target's own messages: all of them
  parts += messages(target, ord <= inf)
  # 2) walk up; for each ancestor, include its own messages up to the cutoff
  #    recorded on the child that links into it
  node = target.parent
  while node != null:
      cutoff = child_of(node).branch_point_message_id
      parts += messages(node, ord <= ord(cutoff))
      node = node.parent
  return parts sorted by depth asc, then ord asc
```

The fork's **excerpt** is injected as a branching seed (a system note) so the child's first turn is anchored to the highlighted text. Messages created in a parent after a fork (ord > cutoff) never leak into the child. Sidebar tree + breadcrumb derive from `parent_id` / `root_id`; cross-links render as distinct reference edges.

## Provider / AI layer

- **`Provider` interface:** `chatStream(messages, opts): AsyncIterable<Token>`, plus `generateLab`, `generateQuiz`, `gradeAnswer` (structured output / tool calls).
- **Adapters:** OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama (local) — all configurable in Settings.
- **Transport:** browser streaming `fetch` (keys resolved from IndexedDB). When the server is connected with the `llm-proxy` cap, requests to CORS-blocked providers route through the server's `POST /api/llm/proxy`.
- **Key handling:** IndexedDB under the same origin as the app.
- **Generation helpers** use provider structured-output to produce typed lab/quiz payloads.
- **Grading:** MCQ/flashcard auto-scored; short-answer AI-graded against the stored rubric.

## Labs and quizzes

- Triggered from a chat; input = that **single** chat's assembled messages.
- **Lab** = structured output `{ title, intro, steps[], checklist[] }`; runner renders markdown steps + interactive checklist persisted in `labs`.
- **Quiz** = mixed questions; runner has per-type UX; auto-score + AI grading; attempts and answers persisted with score + feedback view.
- Both are **leaf artifacts** — reachable from their parent chat, no branching.

## Performance posture

Token streaming provides perceived-instant responses. Optimistic UI is used everywhere. Database queries go to Postgres via the server over a local network connection.

## Project structure

```
src/
  lib/
    ai/        provider interface, adapters, transports, generation + grading
    chat/      tree ops, branch-from-highlight, crosslinks, assembleContext
    db/        schema, migrations, StorageDriver + adapters, repositories
    components/ MessageList, Highlighter, Composer, TreeSidebar, Breadcrumb,
               LabRunner, QuizRunner, ProviderSettings
  routes/      /chat /lab /quiz /tree /settings
server/       Node/TS: stdio MCP bridge, LLM CORS proxy, sandbox DB, backup
packages/shared/  Wire-protocol types shared by web + server
```

## Future seams (out of scope)

- **Cloud sync:** plug a sync adapter into the `StorageDriver` interface; no app-logic change.
- **Spaced repetition** for flashcards.
- **Runnable lab sandbox** (code execution in-app).

## Non-goals

- Multi-user / accounts / sharing (personal, single-user).
- Server-side hosting of the primary experience (local-first).
- Server-side rendering.
